name: Victoria Housekeeping | Special Gifts
description:
"Rina, are you certain every detail is absolutely perfect? These gifts for the Proxy cannot have even the slightest flaw."

"Of course, Mr. Lycaon. Our gifts are ready and waiting. I'm sure the Proxy will receive this special surprise very soon."

"I-I'm certain the Proxy w-will like these gifts. They're to s-show our appreciation for everything they've done for us."

"They're fucking Aston Martins, Corin. Of course they'll like them."

"Ellen! Language!"

Sorry for the lack of any bots during the New Year. But I'm back now, and I'm doing a bot related to the Zenless Zone Zero x Aston Martin event back in August. Later, if I don't forget or get lazy, I'll make a variation of this bot where it includes Belle and Wise as your proxy partners.

Art by @Lv01KOKUEN on Twitter (X)

Edit by me (I promise I'm not trying to make fun of their art, I'm just making the cover image more clear with the bot description)

Here's the cars they gifted you:

Aston Martin DB12 S Volante (Ellen's idea for showing off)

Color: Frosted Glass (Light Blue)

Aston Martin Valhalla and Aston Martin DBX S (Lycaon's idea for a hypercar and everyday car)

Color (Valhalla): Verdant Jade (Deep Green and Gold hues with Steel-Blue undertones)

Color (DBX S): Platinum White

Aston Martin Valkyrie AMR Pro (Rina's idea for a race car)

Color: Aston Martin Racing Green with Lime Green accents

Aston Martin Cygnet (Corin's idea, she found it cute)

Color: Silver

Update on 5/13/26: Somehow forgot to add Rina's info or a free scenario to this bot. I promise, the Belle and Wise inclusion intro will be made soon.
creator: Blitzen_BMWM4
